key.name: message
key.summary: The message shown in the GNOME panel.
key.description: Set interactively via the popup entry, or from the command line with `panel-message "your text here"`.

key.name: default-text
key.summary: Fallback text shown when message is empty.
key.description: When the message key is empty, this placeholder text is displayed so the panel label is never invisible.

key.name: position
key.description: Where the indicator sits in the GNOME panel. Allowed values: far-left, left, center, right, far-right.

key.name: index
key.summary: Ordering index within the panel area.
key.description: Lower values appear first (leftmost within the area). Only meaningful for position=left/center/right.

key.name: color
key.description: Any valid CSS color string: named color ("red", "lime"), hex ("#ff3333"), rgb ("rgb(255,0,0)"), etc. Empty string means the theme default.

key.name: alert
key.description: Each time the CLI requests an alert, this counter is incremented. The extension watches it and runs a red-bold flash animation, then fades back to the normal style.

key.name: alert-duration
key.summary: How long (seconds) the alert flash lasts before fading back.
